description: Accounts in Arabic script. Crossed out with three vertical lines. Mentions Mentions the shop of Abū l-Ḥasan and a sale and money received. There are a few words in Arabic script on the other side, probably from an earlier document that was cut up and reused.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
